tldr: Athena, you're running 203 live ads but they collapse into roughly 8 unique creative concepts — the 'Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off' body copy alone is duplicated verbatim across more than 60 variants. Expect CPM spikes of 30-45% within 7-14 days as Meta's frequency caps catch up to the repetition.

benchmark.context: Fashion jewelry brands typically rotate hero creative every 3-4 weeks. Sarda is recycling the same 'Handcrafted in Bali' body block and 'BOGO + Use Code: STACK' offer across the majority of active placements, which compresses the fatigue window dramatically.

ads.headline: Luxury Sterling Silver & Gemstones, Up to 45% Off
ads.body: Luxury You Deserve — Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Handcrafted by skilled artisans, each SARDA piece features genuine gemstones and .925 sterling silver.  Shop the collection and save up to 45%.
drivers: This exact headline + body combo is running on more than 60 of your live placements — Meta is serving the same creative to overlapping audiences and frequency is almost certainly past 4.0
All variants point to the same /collections/sarda-favorites landing page, so there's zero destination diversity to break the pattern
The 'Up to 45% Off' anchor has been live so long it's lost any sense of urgency — your warm audiences have seen this discount line for months

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping!
ads.body: Buy One Get One Free and comes with a welcome kit on your first purchase.  ✦  Free Shipping ✦  Easy Returns Handcrafted in Bali Built on three generations.
drivers: The 'BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping' headline appears on roughly 30 active variants — half with 'Use Code: STACK' appended, half without, but the body is identical
Every single one routes to /collections/all-of-sarda — no product-specific landing pages to give the algorithm a fresh signal
'Built on three generations' is buried as the last line; your strongest brand differentiator is doing zero hook work

ads.headline: Designed for Your Daily Routine
ads.body: Tired of jewelry that loses its luster after a month?  Most "trendy" pieces are just plated shortcuts. At Sarda, we provide the solution: Jewelry made slowly, so it lasts longer.  - No plated shortcuts.  - No substitutions.  - Just sterling silver and natural gemstones built to endure.
drivers: This problem-aware angle is your strongest copy block — but it's been duplicated across 12+ placements with identical creative, killing its original lift
Headline 'Designed for Your Daily Routine' is generic and doesn't tee up the 'plated shortcuts' callout that's actually doing the persuasive work
All variants land on the homepage — no specific 'sterling silver' collection page to convert the intent the body builds

ads.headline: Mothers Day Sale! Extra 40% Off!
ads.body: Mothers Day is around the corner! Get luxury you deserve!  Handcrafted in Bali. High-end design shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Handcrafted by skilled artisans, each SARDA piece features genuine gemstones and .925 sterling silver.  Shop the Mothers Day sale and save an extra 40% off!
drivers: Eight near-identical Mother's Day variants are live and they share 90% of body copy with the evergreen 'Luxury You Deserve' block
Mother's Day is May 10 — these have a hard expiration in 9 days regardless of fatigue, so any spend after May 8 is wasted
No gift-specific imagery callout, no shipping cutoff date, no 'for Mom' positioning — it's just the same evergreen ad with a holiday sticker

ads.headline: BOGO, Discount and Free Shipping! Use Code: STACK
ads.body: Buy any sterling silver piece, get another of equal or lesser value FREE — your choice.  Use code STACK at checkout.  Plus: free jewelry cleaner welcome kit, free shipping & easy returns.  Don't miss this. First order only.
drivers: This is the cleaner v2 of the BOGO body — but it's running alongside the v1 version on 6+ active placements, which means they're cannibalizing each other in auction
'First order only' restricts this to cold audiences but it's also being shown to your retargeting pools (same /all-of-sarda landing page as the broad campaigns)
Code STACK is the same code that's been live for months — repeat shoppers have already used it or learned to ignore it

ads_compact.headline: Free Gift With First Order
ads_compact.body: Free Gift With First Order + Save 20% Off

ads_compact.headline: Last Chance Styles
ads_compact.body: These styles are on their final run. Once inventory sells through, they will not be restocked. Enjoy savings starting at 40% off while limited quantities remain.

ads_compact.headline: Explore Kunzite
ads_compact.body: Soft pink kunzite, precision-cut for a radiant glow. Effortlessly feminine, beautifully refined.

hero_concept.hook: Botswana agate. Eagle's eye. One bracelet, two reasons to wear it.
hero_concept.headline: Less Pessimism. More Optimism.
hero_concept.primary_text:
Janyl Adair has been carving sterling silver in Bali for three generations. Every stone she chooses has a job — Botswana banded agate is the calm, eagle's eye is the clarity.

The Less Pessimism, More Optimism Bracelet™ pairs both in hand-set .925 silver. It's the piece you put on for the meeting, the appointment, the day that needs both halves of you.

First order ships free with a complimentary jewelry cleaner kit. 5,000+ five-star reviews can't all be wrong.
hero_concept.visual_direction: Hero bracelet shot in soft daylight on a warm linen surface with a single sprig of dried botanical, no model — letting the stone color do the storytelling.
hero_concept.fills_gap: Every active piece either leads with a discount ('Up to 45% Off', 'BOGO', 'Mothers Day Sale') or a generic luxury claim ('Luxury You Deserve') — nothing leads with the actual stones, their meaning, or Janyl as the named maker. This concept turns a single SKU into a story instead of a discount, which is what your warm audiences need to see after months of percentage-off creative.
hero_concept.image_prompt: A photorealistic editorial product photograph featuring the product from the reference image, styled in a soft warm-linen flatlay with a small sprig of dried eucalyptus and a smooth river pebble placed off-center for negative space, with golden-hour window light raking from the left to highlight the gemstone facets and silver detailing. Muted earth-tone palette of cream, sand, and pale sage that signals handcrafted Balinese luxury without feeling stuffy. Square 1:1 composition with breathing room top and bottom for ad text overlay. Maintain the exact appearance, color, and details of the product from the reference image. Premium commerce photography quality. NEGATIVE: no text, no logos, no watermarks, no UI elements, no Facebook interface, no buttons, no faces, no collage, no borders, no duplicate products.
hero_concept.reference_title: Less Pessimism, More Optimism Bracelet™ in Botswana Banded Agate & Eagle's Eye

next_step.urgency: Your top 4 ads hit fatigue between May 6-8 — Mother's Day spend is the immediate bottleneck.
next_step.headline: Let's map a 14-day rotation before CPMs spike.
next_step.body: I'll walk you through which 5 ads to kill this week, the broken DPA setup, and three hero concepts beyond 'The Stone Story' you can ship before Mother's Day cutoff. 30 minutes, no pitch.

method_note: Built by walking through every active Sarda placement in the Meta Ad Library and clustering by headline, body, landing page, and offer structure — fatigue scoring is directional, not a substitute for in-account frequency and CPM data.
